hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */platform/packages/ui/*|*/platform/apps/*) cd "$(echo "$f" | sed 's|/platform/.*|/platform/packages/ui|')" && vp fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */packages/flow-editor/*) cd "$(echo "$f" | sed 's|/packages/flow-editor/.*|/packages/flow-editor|')" && vp fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */framework/apps/kapi-desktop/frontend/*) cd "$(echo "$f" | sed 's|/framework/apps/kapi-desktop/frontend/.*|/framework/apps/kapi-desktop/frontend|')" && vp fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; }
